title: Fishing Crate
description: a high effort version of a mod idea my friend had.
body:
This mod takes my friends simple idea of a crate obtained from fishing with some simple loot and expands it wildly.

there are loot tables in loot tables to create a kind of rarity list of
basic (always and is wood from the crate)
common
uncommon
rare
extraordinary (because it sounded cool)
decor (some fun decorations from crates that have a fish kinda theme and some do things)
and the elusive legendary! (good stuff made very rare (dont know how rare (coverd in chains)))

2 foods which were added for fun being fugu and fancy fugu.
fugu being craftable from pufferfish 2 kelp and a bowl but possibly poisonus/deadly and fancy fugu obtained from crates that is more filling and not poisonus.

also a crate block and crate slab block you can craft (just for decoration)



(also mod image was made with blender)
